grid_backup.title: Grid Backup
grid_backup.desc: Stay powered during outages. Battery covers essential loads when grid goes down.

off_grid.title: Off-Grid Living
off_grid.desc: No grid connection or want full independence. Solar + battery for everything.

grid_tou.title: Grid + Savings (Peak Shaving)
grid_tou.desc: Lower your electricity bill. Battery charges during cheap hours, powers home during expensive hours.

appliances.title: Select Your Appliances
appliances.subtitle: Check the appliances you use. Adjust quantities and run hours as needed.
appliances.peakLoadTip: This assumes all selected devices run at once. Your actual peak may be lower — consider which appliances you'd run simultaneously.

backup.title: Backup Duration
backup.grid_backup: How long do outages typically last?
backup.off_grid: Maximum consecutive cloudy/rainy days to cover?
backup.grid_tou: How many hours of peak electricity prices per day?

location.title: Where are you?
location.subtitle: We'll use local electricity rates and solar data for accurate calculations.
location.dataSource: Reference data from public sources. Edit to match your actual tariff. Exchange rates update hourly.

bill.title: Monthly Electricity Bill (optional)
bill.subtitle: Helps us show your savings more accurately. You can skip this.

results.title: Your Recommended System
results.quoteThanks: Thanks! We'll be in touch shortly.

usage.peakLabel: Peak load — max power at once (kW)

footer.disclaimer: Estimates are for reference only. Actual system design should be verified by a qualified installer.
